content_body:
Huck's General Store is an old-time general store nestled in the beautiful North Georgia Mountains. This classic candy store in Georgia is located on Main Street in the quaint town of Blue Ridge.

You can enjoy watching the train roll by as you rock on their back porch with your favorite beverage.

While looking around, you might find yourself saying, "Do you remember these?" or "I haven't seen these since..." and back to your childhood memories, you go.

You might also grab a bucket and have fun filling it with all your favorite candies from the old-time barrels. If you are feeling adventurous, you can grab a raccoon skin hat and a musket as you hunt through their abundant toy section filled with new and nostalgic toys, puzzles, books, games, and much more.

It is a great place to grab Blue Ridge GA souvenirs - T-shirts, mugs, refrigerator magnets, and so much more.

They also have plentiful assortments of jams, jellies, baking mixes, syrups, dressings, and hot sauces. Huck's has many country and gourmet foods, and the list is far too long to name them all.

At Huck's, they always look forward to each and every person that comes in and visits. There is something for everyone at Huck's General Store.
title: Huck's General Store
